📖 HOW TO PLAY
🎯 OBJECTIVE
Get as close to 51 points as possible without going over. If you reach 51 or more, you lose 1 point!
🎴 CARD VALUES
• 7, 8 = Face value (7, 8 points)
• 9 = 0 points
• 10 = +10 or -10 (you choose)
• J = Reverses turn order (0 points)
• Q = 3 points
• K = 4 points
• A = 1 or 11 points (you choose)
🎮 HOW TO PLAY
1. Click a card to select it (it rises up)
2. Click again to deselect it
3. Click "✓ THROW CARD" to play it
4. For Ace/10, choose value before playing
5. Turn passes clockwise around the table
🏆 WINNING
Play multiple rounds. Whoever has the HIGHEST score at the end wins! Avoid going over 51 to keep your points.
🔄 TURN ORDER
Bottom (YOU) → Top (KARIM) → Right (LAYLA) → Left (SAMI)
